categories.name: MEYER SCHUSSER, IRASCIBLE REFUGEE COMPOSER OF GOLDEN AGE HOLLYWOOD

questions.clue: MGM sent a man they call an arranger--I could do as well with any bricklayer from this city of Schubert, Strauss & Schusser
